regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Tauranga typically charge $80–$120/hr plus a $50–$80 callout fee. Bay of Plenty has seen increased demand from rapid residential growth.

businesses.name: PlumberMan
businesses.known_for: Family business since 1995 with 'on time or it's free' guarantee; perfect 100% NoCowboys score across all reviews.

businesses.name: BOP Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: NZ Master Plumber of the Year; 30+ years family-owned, 24/7 emergency, Super Gold Card discounts available.

businesses.name: The Plumbing Collective
businesses.known_for: Full-service residential and commercial plumbing across Bay of Plenty; specialist in gas fitting and hot water heat pumps.

businesses.name: Pro-Flo Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Rapid-response local plumbers known for clear pricing, reliable scheduling, and quality workmanship.

businesses.name: Laser Plumbing Tauranga
businesses.known_for: Master Plumbers franchise with local team; residential, commercial, gas, and drain services.
